title: Eastern-Style Chicken and Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish from the Eastern Mediterranean region, incorporating chicken, rice, and Middle Eastern spices.

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores or online

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion, carrots, and celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Middle Eastern spice blend, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the uncooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice blend and chicken broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
